600.q: What is the origin of Monica and Chandler's relationship?
600.a: They hooked up in London at Ross's wedding to Emily in Season 4 — Chandler comforted Monica

600.q: What is Phoebe's tragic backstory?
600.a: Her mother killed herself and her father abandoned her — she was briefly homeless and lived on the streets

600.q: What are Chandler's parents' careers?
600.a: Father (Charles Bing) is a drag queen performer; mother (Nora Tyler Bing) is a romance novelist

600.q: What is the significance of the Season 3 bottle episode?
600.a: The One Where No One Is Ready — real-time chaos in Monica's apartment before a charity event

600.q: What is the deeper theme of Friends?
600.a: Family you choose — the six friends create a found family that supports each other through every major life event

What was the show's most expensive episode?
600.a: The One in Vegas (Season 5) — filmed on location

600.q: What is the fountain in the opening credits?
600.a: Filmed in Burbank, California — not New York City

600.q: What happened to Matt Perry after Friends?
600.a: He appeared in Joey and other projects — he passed away in October 2023
